{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33688944?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ik0z", "id": 33688944, "login": "ik0z", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMzNjg4OTQ0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ik0z", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46549", "cvss": {"score": 2.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 2.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

The OAuth token strategy attached `oauth_scope` and `oauth_granted_resources` to the request user, but the ACL middleware never consulted either. An OAuth token issued with a restricted scope (e.g. MCP-only) therefore inherited the full permissions of the underlying user across all routes; the `granted_resources.base_id` restriction was bypassed on org-level endpoints that don't populate `req.context.base_id`.

### Details

In `packages/nocodb/src/strategies/oauth-token.strategy.ts`, the strategy set `is_oauth_token`, `oauth_client_id`, `oauth_granted_resources`, and `oauth_scope` on the user object, then mapped through to the user's existing `roles` / `base_roles`. The ACL middleware in `extract-ids.middleware.ts` honoured `is_api_token` via `blockApiTokenAccess` but had no equivalent gate for `is_oauth_token` or scope-string enforcement.

The base/workspace restriction logic short-circuited when `req.context.base_id` was unset (org-level routes), so an OAuth token scoped to one base could still call org-level endpoints as the underlying user.

The fix adds a path-prefix allowlist (`['/mcp', '/api/v3/', '/auth/user/me']`) enforced inside the strategy and a `blockOAuthTokenAccess` ACL flag for endpoints that should never accept OAuth tokens.

### Impact

- Scope escalation: tokens issued with a narrow scope received the underlying user's full role.
- Resource boundary bypass: per-base restrictions did not apply to org-level routes.
- Violates least-privilege expectation for third-party OAuth integrations.

### Credit

This issue was reported by [@ik0z](https://github.com/ik0z).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00151, "percentile": 0.04596}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46549"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: OAuth Token Scope Not Enforced at ACL Layer Allows Scope Escalation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T20:34:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m5qg-rvjq-727p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.301.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: OAuth Token Scope Not Enforced at ACL Layer Allows Scope Escalation
